SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.entrant

Class EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder>
com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Enclosing class:
EntrantNotificationActivity
private class EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder>
Inner class adapter responsible for binding notification data to the RecyclerView. Handles displaying message text and wiring up interactive buttons for invitations.

    Class
    Description
    (package private) class 
    EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for notification items.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    acceptCoOrganizerInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
    Accepts an invitation to become a co-organizer for an event.
    private void
    acceptLotteryInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
    Accepts a lottery invitation by updating the user's status in the event's waiting list to "Enrolled", and deletes the notification.
    private void
    acceptPrivateInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
    Accepts a private invitation to an event, updating the user's status from Pending to Waitlist in Firestore, and removes the notification.
    private void
    declineCoOrganizerInvite(String notifId)
    Declines a co-organizer invitation by deleting the notification from Firestore.
    private void
    declineLotteryInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
    Declines a lottery invitation by updating the user's status to "Cancelled", deleting the notification, and triggering a replacement draw.
    private void
    declinePrivateInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
    Declines a private invitation by updating the status to Cancelled and deleting the notification.
    private void
    deleteNotification(String notifId)
    Deletes a specified notification document from the user's notifications collection in Firestore.
    private void
    drawReplacement(String eventId)
    Automatically selects a replacement from the remaining waitlist if a selected user declines their lottery invitation, updating the new winner's status to "Invited" and dispatching a new notification to them.
    int
    getItemCount()
    Returns the total number of items in the data set held by the adapter.

  • Method Details

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Called when the RecyclerView needs a new EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder of the given type to represent an item.
      Specified by:
      onCreateViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      parent - The ViewGroup into which the new View will be added after it is bound to an adapter position.
      viewType - The view type of the new View.
      Returns:
      A new ViewHolder that holds a View of the given view type.

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder holder, int position)
      Called by RecyclerView to display the data at the specified position. Adjusts button visibility and attaches appropriate click listeners based on notification type.
      Specified by:
      onBindViewHolder in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Parameters:
      holder - The ViewHolder which should be updated to represent the contents of the item at the given position.
      position - The position of the item within the adapter's data set.

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of items in the data set held by the adapter.
      Specified by:
      getItemCount in class androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter.ViewHolder>
      Returns:
      The total number of notifications.

    • acceptPrivateInvite

      private void acceptPrivateInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
      Accepts a private invitation to an event, updating the user's status from Pending to Waitlist in Firestore, and removes the notification.

    • declinePrivateInvite

      private void declinePrivateInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
      Declines a private invitation by updating the status to Cancelled and deleting the notification.

    • acceptLotteryInvite

      private void acceptLotteryInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
      Accepts a lottery invitation by updating the user's status in the event's waiting list to "Enrolled", and deletes the notification.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event the user won the lottery for.
      notifId - The ID of the notification to be deleted.

    • declineLotteryInvite

      private void declineLotteryInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
      Declines a lottery invitation by updating the user's status to "Cancelled", deleting the notification, and triggering a replacement draw.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event the user is declining.
      notifId - The ID of the notification to be deleted.

    • drawReplacement

      private void drawReplacement(String eventId)
      Automatically selects a replacement from the remaining waitlist if a selected user declines their lottery invitation, updating the new winner's status to "Invited" and dispatching a new notification to them.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event for which a replacement is being drawn.

    • acceptCoOrganizerInvite

      private void acceptCoOrganizerInvite(String eventId, String notifId)
      Accepts an invitation to become a co-organizer for an event. Adds the user's ID to the event's coOrganizerIds array, removes them from the event's waiting list, decrements the waitlist count, and deletes the notification.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event the user will co-organize.
      notifId - The ID of the notification to be deleted.

    • declineCoOrganizerInvite

      private void declineCoOrganizerInvite(String notifId)
      Declines a co-organizer invitation by deleting the notification from Firestore.
      Parameters:
      notifId - The ID of the notification to be deleted.

    • getProfileMap

      private HashMap<String,Object> getProfileMap()
      Helper method to map the current profile's attributes to a HashMap for Firestore storage.
      Returns:
      A HashMap containing the entrant's name, email, and phone number.

    • deleteNotification

      private void deleteNotification(String notifId)
      Deletes a specified notification document from the user's notifications collection in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      notifId - The document ID of the notification to delete.
